title: AI assistance and semantic diversity
summary: Fixture evidence suggests AI-assisted brainstorming may improve average idea quality while reducing semantic diversity in some short-form writing tasks.
public_caveats: Evidence is from short-form creative writing fixtures.

title: AI assistance and creative originality
summary: Accepted fixture claims indicate AI assistance can raise output volume while leaving open whether originality gains persist outside controlled ideation tasks.
public_caveats: Fixture-derived synthesis; not a live literature review.
